violations.text: Frozen food items within the walk-in freezer were observed thawed and no longer frozen solid to the touch. Per PIC, all food items were received the prior morning and will be returned to supplier for credit. Product confirmed segregated for return. PIC will send confirmation of return. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2025

The walk-in freezer was observed holding an ambient temperature of 36 degrees Fahrenheit and was not in good repair. Establishment is not to store any frozen food items in walk-in freezer until unit is repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2025
